architectural_notes: Website Settings endpoint uses validateSession(request) for authentication, same pattern as Media endpoint

new_feature_requests.summary: In the Website Settings backend endpoint (backend/main.mo), remove all existing manual session validation logic including header checks and token parsing
Call validateSession(request) at the start of the Website Settings endpoint exactly as implemented in the Media endpoint
Use the user Principal returned from validateSession for authorization checks in the Website Settings endpoint
Return HTTP 401 Unauthorized from the Website Settings endpoint only if validateSession fails

projectName: Refactor Website Settings endpoint to use standard session validation
